info.name: Qlik Sense Enterprise Qlik Sense Data Connection API
Qlik Sense Enterprise List data connections

params.name: Xrfkey
params.description: Cross-site request forgery prevention key matching the X-Qlik-Xrfkey header.

params.name: filter
params.description: Filter expression using syntax: property operator value (e.g., name eq 'MyConnection')

params.name: orderby
params.description: Property name to order results by

params.name: privileges
params.description: Whether to append privilege information to returned entities

items.docs: Retrieves a list of all data connections in condensed format, optionally filtered by a query expression. Returns connections accessible to the authenticated user based on security rules.

info.name: Qlik Sense Enterprise Create data connection

params.name: Xrfkey
params.description: Cross-site request forgery prevention key matching the X-Qlik-Xrfkey header.

items.docs: Creates a new data connection for use by Qlik Sense applications. The connection defines the provider type, connection string, and credentials for accessing an external data source.

info.name: Qlik Sense Enterprise List data connections with full details

params.name: Xrfkey
params.description: Cross-site request forgery prevention key matching the X-Qlik-Xrfkey header.

params.name: filter
params.description: Filter expression using syntax: property operator value (e.g., name eq 'MyConnection')

params.name: orderby
params.description: Property name to order results by

params.name: privileges
params.description: Whether to append privilege information to returned entities

items.docs: Retrieves a list of all data connections in full format including owner, tags, custom properties, and connection string details.

info.name: Qlik Sense Enterprise Count data connections

params.name: Xrfkey
params.description: Cross-site request forgery prevention key matching the X-Qlik-Xrfkey header.

params.name: filter
params.description: Filter expression using syntax: property operator value (e.g., name eq 'MyConnection')

items.docs: Returns the number of data connections matching an optional filter expression.

info.name: Qlik Sense Enterprise Get data connection by ID

params.name: Xrfkey
params.description: Cross-site request forgery prevention key matching the X-Qlik-Xrfkey header.

params.name: id
params.description: Unique identifier (GUID) of the data connection

params.name: privileges
params.description: Whether to append privilege information to returned entities

items.docs: Retrieves a single data connection by its unique identifier in full format.

info.name: Qlik Sense Enterprise Update data connection

params.name: Xrfkey
params.description: Cross-site request forgery prevention key matching the X-Qlik-Xrfkey header.

params.name: id
params.description: Unique identifier (GUID) of the data connection

items.docs: Updates an existing data connection. The complete entity including the unchanged modifiedDate must be provided in the request body.

info.name: Qlik Sense Enterprise Delete data connection

params.name: Xrfkey
params.description: Cross-site request forgery prevention key matching the X-Qlik-Xrfkey header.

params.name: id
params.description: Unique identifier (GUID) of the data connection

items.docs: Permanently deletes a data connection from the repository. Applications referencing this connection will no longer be able to load data from it.
